title: 大きなことは、大きくない

text_block_list.text:
I remember, a long time ago, a friend and I used
to play pretend cafe. We only had one thing on
the menu. After all...

text_block_list.name: Fishmonger
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to pay me back! I was in a rush
myself, so we're even!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but, it's my fault! I bumped into you, and now
your stock is all over the ground! I... I have to
cover your losses!

text_block_list.name: Fishmonger
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Well, if you insist on doing something,
could you go to this place for me?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Why do these things always happen...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Welcome.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I didn't know you were running this shop,
Cafe... I'll just take the seat right at the end.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Or! Or! I don't need a seat! I'll just stand next to
that cat tower in the corner... A klutz like me
doesn't deserve to sit down...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I'll pour you... a cup of coffee.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Here you are.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
...Oh! It's a latte art of Mr. Tanuki! Wow, he's so
cute. And...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: His beady little eyes are so... calming to look at...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
There's a whole cluster of stars in there... and
every star shines so bright.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Take a look, Doto. That one there is... Jupiter.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The part that looks like an eye, you can fit the
entire Earth in there.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huuuh?! In there?! But... the Earth is like a billion
times bigger than my face!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Light travels from stars far, far away. It takes
hundreds, even millions of years, but it comes
to... us.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
That's a lot of time to wrap your head around.
Wow, I didn't even know...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...In this mysterious world of ours, everything is
small. Everything lasts only an instant...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...That goes for us, our lives, and of course...
every event within our lives.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Everything is small, even myself...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Huh... when did I fall asleep?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
You look calmer now than when you arrived... I'm
glad to see it.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, I can't believe I fell asleep! Just another
mistake to add to the pile.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Or maybe not? I guess... it's not a big deal.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Thank you for the coffee, Cafe. It was delicious!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I'm looking forward to your next visit. I will have
a special brew ready... just for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking around the academy...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
That's right! The coffee was so delicious. I'd love
to visit that cafe again...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
We should be able to, now that I know it wasn't
just a dream.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch... but this liminal space thing is illogical as
heck.
